age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for Professor Emeritus is 70 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Distinguished Professors in Engineering, Science, Management, Architecture, Humanities, Arts & Social Sciences, Education and Multidisciplinary Centres. Faculty superannuated/ retired from NITs/IITs/IISc or comparable institutions, with suitable externally sponsored projects or comparable activities, in addition to shouldering normal teaching responsibilities and project guidance.
qualification.details: Professor Emeritus: Distinguished Professors in the Departments of Engineering, Science, Management, Architecture, Humanities, Arts & Social Sciences, Education and also in the different Multidisciplinary Centres. Faculty superannuated/ retired from NITs/IITs/IISc or comparable institutions, with suitable externally sponsored projects or comparable activities, in addition to shouldering normal teaching responsibilities and project guidance.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1,20,000/- per month and monthly allowances up to Rs.20,000/- on reimbursable basis
salary_details.details: Professor Emeritus: Rs. 1,20,000/- per month and monthly allowances up to Rs.20,000/- on reimbursable basis

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Calicut Professor Emeritus Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Calicut to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Calicut Professor Emeritus Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut Professor Emeritus recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Professor Emeritus post at NIT Calicut is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Professor Emeritus position?
faq.answer: Candidates should be distinguished professors who have retired from NITs, IITs, IISc, or comparable institutions. They should have externally sponsored projects or comparable activities and be willing to undertake teaching and project guidance.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Professor Emeritus position is 70 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Professor Emeritus role?
faq.answer: The Professor Emeritus will receive an honorarium of Rs. 1,20,000/- per month. Additionally, monthly allowances up to Rs. 20,000/- are provided on a reimbursable basis.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Calicut Professor Emeritus position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply online through the official recruitment portal of NIT Calicut. The application process involves registration, filling the form, and uploading necessary documents.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for the Professor Emeritus recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official website for any updates regarding fees.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Professor Emeritus role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial scrutiny of the applications received. Shortlisted candidates will then be called for an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Institute of Technology Calicut is www.nitc.ac.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and updates.

faq.question: Q9. What documents do I need to upload with my application?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to upload all documentary evidence supporting their credentials and claimed credit points. This typically includes educational certificates, experience certificates, and details of sponsored projects.

faq.question: Q10. Who should I contact for technical issues with the online application portal?
faq.answer: For any technical issues related to the online application portal, candidates should contact [email protected]. No other means of communication will be entertained for technical queries.
